mainTasks: Downloading orders from Shopify, formatting them in Google Sheets, and manually emailing the warehouse for fulfillment. Copy-pasting tracking numbers back into Shopify.
painPoint: Order fulfillment delays and human error in tracking numbers causing customer complaints.

mainTasks: Pulling data from Google Analytics and HubSpot to create weekly client reports in Canva. Chasing clients on Slack for asset approvals.
painPoint: Reporting takes up the entire Friday, preventing us from actually working on campaign strategy.

mainTasks: Extracting data from QuickBooks to reconcile accounts in Excel. Manually scheduling follow-up meetings via Gmail back-and-forth.
painPoint: We spend too much time scheduling and doing manual data entry instead of advising clients.
